items.name: Steam
items.description: Gaming platform by Valve (native package for best performance)

commands.apt: sudo dpkg --add-architecture i386 && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y steam-installer

items.name: Microsoft Fonts
items.description: Core Microsoft TrueType fonts (Arial, Times New Roman, etc.)

commands.dnf: sudo dnf install -y curl cabextract xorg-x11-font-utils fontconfig && sudo rpm -i https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/mscorefonts2/rpms/msttcore-fonts-installer-2.6-1.noarch.rpm

items.name: xpadneo (Xbox Controller Driver)
items.description: Advanced Linux driver for Xbox One/Series wireless controllers

commands.all: sudo bash -c 'apt install -y dkms linux-headers-$(uname -r) 2>/dev/null || dnf install -y dkms kernel-devel 2>/dev/null || pacman -S --noconfirm dkms linux-headers 2>/dev/null; cd /tmp && rm -rf xpadneo && git clone https://github.com/atar-axis/xpadneo.git && cd xpadneo && ./install.sh'

items.name: Common Codecs
items.description: GStreamer multimedia codecs for video and audio playback

commands.apt: sudo apt install -y gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad gstreamer1.0-plugins-ugly gstreamer1.0-libav
commands.dnf: sudo dnf install -y gstreamer1-plugins-good gstreamer1-plugins-bad-free gstreamer1-plugins-ugly gstreamer1-plugins-bad-freeworld gstreamer1-plugin-libav
commands.pacman: sudo pacman -S --noconfirm gst-plugins-good gst-plugins-bad gst-plugins-ugly gst-libav
commands.zypper: sudo zypper install -y gstreamer-plugins-good gstreamer-plugins-bad gstreamer-plugins-ugly gstreamer-plugins-libav

items.name: btop++
items.description: Resource monitor with advanced CPU, memory, disk, network, and process stats

items.name: fastfetch
items.description: Fast and feature-rich system information tool

commands.apt: sudo apt install -y fastfetch || (sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:zhangsongcui3371/fastfetch && sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y fastfetch)
